nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "State Mountaineering Reward Scheme" was launched by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to provide awards in the field of mountaineering is in place to enthusiastically engage and inspire the youth of the state towards risky and adventurous activities like summiting, mountaineering and rock climbing and to honor and commend the youth of the state who have achieved exceptional achievements in the field of mountaineering. Under the scheme, a cash award, a memento, and a certificate will be awarded to each of the adventurers of the state every year for their outstanding achievements in the field of mountaineering.
schemeContent.benefits_md: A cash award of ₹25,000/-, a memento, and a certificate will be awarded to each of the adventurers of the state every year for their outstanding achievements in the field of mountaineering.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: A person who has previously received an award in this field will not be eligible for the award.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme provides awards in the field of mountaineering is in place to enthusiastically engage and inspire the youth of the state towards risky and adventurous activities like summiting, mountaineering and rock climbing and to honour and commend the youth of the state.

children.text: The scheme "State Mountaineering Reward Scheme" was launched by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to provide awards in the field of mountaineering is in place to enthusiastically engage and inspire the youth of the state towards risky and adventurous activities like summiting, mountaineering and rock climbing and to honor and commend the youth of the state who have achieved exceptional achievements in the field of mountaineering. Under the scheme, a cash award, a memento, and a certificate will be awarded to each of the adventurers of the state every year for their outstanding achievements in the field of mountaineering.
A cash award of ₹25,000/-, a memento, and a certificate will be awarded to each of the adventurers of the state every year for their outstanding achievements in the field of mountaineering.
A person who has previously received an award in this field will not be eligible for the award.
Step 1:
Visit to
official website
of the Sports, Youth & Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat.
Step 2:
Click on the "Schemes" section on the website. A list of available schemes will appear. From the list of schemes, select "State Mountaineering Reward Scheme."
Step 3:
A new page will display the scheme details. Scroll down on this page to find and download the "Application Form for State Mountaineering Award
(Annexure-A
Step 4:
Fill out the application form completely and clearly. Ensure all correspondence details, including telephone/mobile number, are clearly mentioned.
Step 5:
Gather all necessary supporting documents as listed in the Documents Required section. Submit the application form along with the supporting documents in duplicate.
Step 6:
Ensure the application is submitted within the stipulated time frame. Incomplete or unclear applications will not be accepted.
Step 7:
The submitted applications will be scrutinised by the State Level Selection Committee. The final selection will be made by the state-level selection committee from the received applications.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** Visit to [official website](https://sycd.gujarat.gov.in/) of the Sports, Youth & Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat. **Step 2:** Click on the "Schemes" section on the website. A list of available schemes will appear. From the list of schemes, select "State Mountaineering Reward Scheme." **Step 3:** A new page will display the scheme details. Scroll down on this page to find and download the "Application Form for State Mountaineering Award [(Annexure-A](https://commi-synca.gujarat.gov.in/writereaddata/Portal/Images/pdf/State-Mountaineering-Award-form.pdf)). **Step 4:** Fill out the application form completely and clearly. Ensure all correspondence details, including telephone/mobile number, are clearly mentioned. **Step 5:****** Gather all necessary supporting documents as listed in the Documents Required section. Submit the application form along with the supporting documents in duplicate. **Step 6:****** Ensure the application is submitted within the stipulated time frame. Incomplete or unclear applications will not be accepted. **Step 7:****** The submitted applications will be scrutinised by the State Level Selection Committee. The final selection will be made by the state-level selection committee from the received applications.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant must be a native of Gujarat. - The applicant should have climbed a height of 7,000 meters once or a height of more than 6,000 meters twice. - The climbing achievement of the applicant must be confirmed by the Director of the Indian Mountaineering Foundation (IMF). - The applicant should not be involved in any criminal activity. ****This award can also be given posthumously, for which the legal heir of the awardee will have to apply.***

children.text: The applicant must be a native of Gujarat.
The applicant should have climbed a height of 7,000 meters once or a height of more than 6,000 meters twice.
The climbing achievement of the applicant must be confirmed by the Director of the Indian Mountaineering Foundation (IMF).
The applicant should not be involved in any criminal activity.
*This award can also be given posthumously, for which the legal heir of the awardee will have to apply.
